name: Caesar Salad with Tortellini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first six ingredients and stir well with a whisk.
2. Cook the tortellini in boiling water for 7 minutes or until tender (omit salt and fat). Drain well and set aside.
3. Arrange asparagus in a vegetable steamer over boiling water. Steam for 2 minutes or until crisp-tender. Combine asparagus and tortellini in a bowl, adding 2 tablespoons of lemon juice mixture and tossing gently to coat.
4. Place lettuce in a large bowl; drizzle remaining lemon juice mixture over lettuce and toss well. Add tortellini mixture, tossing gently to coat. Spoon salad onto serving plates and sprinkle cheese on top.
